Lactating women : Cereals-1, Pulses-2, Fat/Oil-2, Milk-2, Fruit-1, Green Leafy Vegetables-1/2 Between 6-12 months of lactation, diet intake should be gradually brought back to normal. Elderly women : Fruit-1, reduce cereals and millets-2. 20 Figure 4 4 Guideline 2 Why additional diet is required during pregnancy and lactation ? What are the nutrients that require special attention ?
